examples: Thus we hold that the direct HCl dissolution method can replace the high temperature alkali fuse to analysis the calcium oxide and magnesian in limestone.
Nickel bismuth magnesian is recycled by multiprecipitate after molybdenum is deposited from molybdenum-leaching solution and industrial production is realized.
The green tourmaline was discovered in weathethered mantle of a granite body somewhere inGuanxi by a preasant in 1992. It is a magnesian tourmaline by identification.
